description: AURA  Dual-model machine learning framework for customer churn risk classification and lead-time prediction in cloud services, implemented with XGBoost, FastAPI, and Streamlit.

A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.

This repository demonstrates a complete, production-grade Machine Learning lifecycle. Inspired by the 'Made With ML' framework, this project goes beyond model training to implement robust data engineering, automated testing, and CI/CD deployment.

A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.

A growing collection of fundamental Machine Learning algorithms implemented completely from scratch using Python and `numpy`. This repository serves as an educational resource to understand the inner workings of various ML models without relying on high-level frameworks like scikit-learn for the core logic.

A full-stack learning journey combining Django REST Framework, React.js, and Machine Learning. Includes DRF practice APIs and a complete stock prediction portal using LSTM, data analysis, and real-world integration.

A standardized automation framework for initializing Python AI & Machine Learning workspaces. Features dynamic PyTorch/CUDA environment isolation, Jupyter kernel integration, and structured workspace directory scaffolding.

A hybrid machine-learning and EOF-based framework for long-lead ENSO prediction using oceanatmosphere predictors (Nio-3.4 SST, SOI, and warm water volume). The model integrates EOF-based dimensionality reduction with ridge regression and random forest to improve forecast skill up to 24 months.
Machine Learning pipeline (Random Forest, XGBoost, Stacking) and SHAP explainability framework used to identify structural growth barriers for startups. Code for my academic research paper.
A dual-layered security framework using Machine Learning for PE-header based malware detection (KNN) and behavioral fraud analysis (Isolation Forest & K-Means).

This project implements a hybrid deep learning and machine learning framework inspired by the paper AI-Synthesized Image Detection: Source Camera Fingerprinting to Discern the Authenticity of Digital Images. It extracts 2048-dimensional deep features using a pretrained CNN and classifies source cameras using an SVM classifier.

A machine learning project that predicts next-day stock returns using financial time-series data and technical indicators. The study compares linear, kernel-based, and ensemble models (OLS, SVR, Random Forest) under a time-series-aware evaluation framework.

Goal is to support clinicians by identifying treatment with lowest depression risk, while also providing explainability features to the machine learning process.

JNet is a Java machine learning framework consisting of tools and libraries for building and running neural networks and machine learning models through built-in APIs. Just like previous frameworks, it is a great place to get your hands dirty and experiment with the guts of a model directly!

This repository contains an industry-grade, end-to-end MLOps framework built on AWS. The project addresses the "silent killers" of production machine learning: Model Drift and Algorithmic Bias.

By leveraging Machine Learning and Time-Series Analysis, it forecasts requirements with high precision, mitigating the "bullwhip effect" and optimizing global supply chain margins.
